steps.title: Identify the cause
steps.content: The trend is that many recently discovered minor planets receive only identification numbers. The sentence explains the reason: there are over 500,000 such bodies, making unique names nearly impossible.

steps.title: Reject noncausal words
steps.content: B means called or directed to, C means hinted at, and D means placed in someone's care. The idiom needed here expresses that the trend is caused by or explained by the large number of bodies. The answer is A.
